title: ✨ The Zenith Update is Here!
message: We've refined the void. Experience smoother animations, interactive clock faces, and the new Zen Focus tools.
points: 🌌 New Interactive Globe: Explore timezones with the new 3D spatial view.
🧘 Zen Focus Mode: Lock your phone down. No escapes, no distractions.
📈 Progress Timeline: Capture and track your focus sessions visually.
⚡ Performance Boost: Smoother glassmorphism rendering across all devices.

title: 🚀 Tymio Launch
message: Welcome to the future of time and focus tracking.
